summary: Disambiguate 'materialized view' across Fabric workloads — it means three different things depending on whether you are in a Lakehouse, an Eventhouse/KQL database, or a Warehouse.

meanings.description: Pre-computed Delta table snapshot refreshed on a schedule via execution definitions.
A continuously-updated aggregation over a source table, created with the .create materialized-view management command.
example_commands: fabio kql-database manage --workspace $WS --id $KDB --command ".create materialized-view MV on table T { T | summarize count() by bin(ts, 1h) }"

meanings.description: Fabric Warehouse does not support materialized views. Use a regular view, or a scheduled CTAS (CREATE TABLE AS SELECT) pattern to persist aggregates.
example_commands: fabio warehouse query --workspace $WS --id $WH --sql "CREATE VIEW dbo.v AS SELECT ..."

default_action: If the workload is unclear, ask the user: 'Are you working with a Lakehouse (Materialized Lake View) or an Eventhouse (KQL Materialized View)?' before proceeding.
